## Summary
- What changed?
- Why this change?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature (`feature/<featureNameOrID>`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`bugfix/<bugNameOrID>`)

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Code Review & Compatibility
- [ ] Code review completed.
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced.
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if applicable).
